text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm working late into the night when a sudden
knock on the door brings a visitor into my office.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good evening! Did someone call for an
acupuncturist? I'm here to give your trainee's
chakra points a few pokes!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Wait, she's not even here right now. Welp, I guess
that makes sense since it's already so late.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
In that case, why don't you choose a treatment
option first? ☆ I'll finish up her treatment by
tomorrow!
choice_data_list: I don't remember calling for an acupuncturist.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Do you not trust me? There's
nothing to be worried about! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm just going to poke a harmless needle or two
into dear <chrname>!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
If the treatment is successful, the two of you will
be able to achieve any dreams you have! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Not a clue! After all, I've never failed before!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
...Of course, that's mostly because this will be my first
time treating anyone.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Come on, I'll do the best I can! You can trust me
on that, at the very least! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
So tell me, what aspect do you want to improve in
your trainee? I'll grant any wish you may have
with a little poke!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I smell danger in the air, but I figure there might—and I emphasize might—be a chance of getting something special out of this treatment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What should I do?
choice_data_list: I'd like her to become stronger.
I'd like her to win races.
I'd like her health to improve.
I'd like her to become more charming.
This is too sketchy. I should quit while I still can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So you want me to activate the
strength chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure with your
choice? There's no going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows
up for training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's overflowing with so much power she's
almost unrecognizable!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to activate the
winning chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure with your
choice? There's no going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows
up for training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can sense a huge improvement in her skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to activate the
health chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure with your
choice? There's no going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows
up for training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her entire body is radiating a healthy glow! She's
the absolute picture of health!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. So, you want me to activate the
charm chakra?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do just that, then! Are you sure with your
choice? There's no going back after!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
All righty, just leave it to me! Look forward to
tomorrow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, when <chrname> shows
up for training...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's overflowing with charm! She's bound to turn
heads everywhere she goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We took a chance and it paid off! This is a great
leap toward achieving our goal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her condition is absolutely deplorable...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should've known better than to test our luck. I'm
not the one suffering, yet I'm full of regret.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Aw, c'mon! Don't be like that!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, don't be so stingy! It's just a harmless
needle!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you working overtime? Oh... I didn't
know you had a visitor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what awful timing! ☆ I guess there's
nothing I can do here.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: This is my cue to retreat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the tumultuous storm leaves as suddenly
as it came. I turn my focus back to my work and
try to forget what happened just now.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Had a change of heart, did you? No worries, it
happens!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead and tell me which chakra you want me
to activate for your lovely trainee!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Geez, you still can't decide? I don't have all day!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, are you working overtime? Oh... I didn't
know you had a visitor.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, what awful timing! ☆ I guess there's
nothing I can do here.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: This is my cue to retreat! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The situation takes a sharp turn before I can
make a decision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What was that all about? I turn my focus back to
my work and try to forget what happened just
now.
